name: Golfzon Social - Scarsdale
about: Golfzon Social - Scarsdale is an indoor golf and entertainment space that combines world-class simulators with a full-service sports bar and event spaces. The venue offers over 240 virtually recreated golf courses with adjustable difficulty for all skill levels. Pricing is structured on a per-bay hourly basis, with a standard round of 18 holes taking approximately 45 minutes to one hour. It is designed for both golf and socializing, making it suitable for a range of activities from casual play to corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge simulators with adjustable difficulty for all skill levels
Full-service bar and food menu available onsite
Private VIP rooms available for events and groups
Expert golf instruction and coaching available

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated bar food available onsite with a full menu
Full bar service available with local beers and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Guests are encouraged to bring their own clubs. Rental sets for adults and kids, as well as limited lefty sets, are available on a first-come, first-served basis.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drink are not permitted. Guests can enjoy elevated bar food, local beers, and cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For the average golfer, it takes 45 minutes to 1 hour to play a round of 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a safe environment for players of all ages. They also host junior golf camps and family events.
